title: Chore: Add centralized logging infrastructure
original_text: Added centralized logging infrastructure with ELK stack. Implemented log aggregation from all services. Added log parsing and indexing. Implemented log search and filtering. Added log visualization dashboards. Implemented log alerting based on patterns. Added log retention policies. Added log access control. Result: logging infrastructure operational.
expected_subject: chore(logging): add centralized logging with ELK stack
expected_body_lines: - Implement log aggregation from all services
- Add log alerting and retention policies
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(logging): add centralized logging with ELK stack"
